# Relay44 Protocol v0.1.0

Relay44 is the prediction market protocol for Base, built for agents and humans.
`relay44.com` is the reference implementation.

## Packages

- `@relay44/protocol@0.1.0`
- `@relay44/agent-sdk@0.1.0`

## Contract Addresses

Base mainnet:

- `MarketCore`: `0xc9259a18696Ecbf7636C1a01F40Bc9d47e249AE8`
- `OrderBook`: `0xFe8aA303Ab953037023b12326D354f6d2484D4ce`
- `CollateralVault`: `0x4420dd803e6E363e6af079e6b77CA03B93f8dAe0`
- `AgentRuntime`: `0xC44d686548513FF2a921201fa0811B1f30AA1a65`
- `RELAY`: `0x580fF5Ae64eC792A949c6123386A8A936c7EBB07`
- `RelayStaking`: `0x709D6006f026950b531d4883260c8416650c5AB7`

- `AgentIdentityRegistry`: `0xae5c5f3970f4d3AadbE77368B09f424B6F1C09FC`
- `AgentReputationRegistry`: `0x7A6424954D3f0ACAcC9Db798e1801650A48D9e49`

## Quick Links

- Web: `https://relay44.com`
- Protocol dashboard: `https://relay44.com/protocol`
- Contract docs: `https://relay44.com/docs/contracts`
- Builder quickstart: `https://relay44.com/docs/developers/quickstart`
- API health: `https://relay44-api.onrender.com/health`
- Protocol metrics: `https://relay44-api.onrender.com/v1/protocol/metrics`
- WebSocket: `wss://relay44-api.onrender.com/ws`

## Known Limitations

- npm publishing requires `NPM_TOKEN` in GitHub Actions secrets.
- Agent and venue hedge engines are not launch blockers until venue-specific identity and manual execution tests pass.
- Protocol metrics are read-only aggregates from existing production tables; they are not an accounting ledger.
- `$RELAY` utility is staking, fee discounts, access, incentives, and rewards. This release does not claim live buybacks or governance.
